features: 【Material】The hair brush is made of wheat straw and PP materials, scratch-resistant, non-toxic to your skin, can keep hair looking shiny and improve hair texture.
【Package】In this package, you will receive a hairdressing supplies, which can massage the scalp and promote hair growth.
【Advantage】Separate the hair from the side instead of downwards so the detangler hair brush can untie the most stubborn tangles gently and painlessly.
【Design】The semi-ventilated design helps remove moisture faster. The soft, anti-static bristles gently detangle and protect hair.
【Application】Optimal hair care for curly, wavy, straight, long, thin or thick hair. Suitable for women, men and children.
